mapper.insert: insert into batch.dead_letter_task ( tenant_id, source_type, source_id, dead_letter_reason, payload_ref, replay_status, replay_count, last_replay_at, last_replay_result, trace_id ) values ( #{tenantId}, #{sourceType}, #{sourceId}, #{deadLetterReason}, #{payloadRef}, #{replayStatus}, #{replayCount}, #{lastReplayAt}, #{lastReplayResult}, #{traceId} )
mapper.update: update batch.dead_letter_task set replay_status = #{successStatus}, replay_count = #{replayCount}, last_replay_at = #{lastReplayAt}, last_replay_result = #{lastReplayResult}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}

update batch.dead_letter_task set replay_status = #{targetStatus}, replay_count = #{replayCount}, last_replay_at = #{lastReplayAt}, last_replay_result = #{lastReplayResult}, updated_at = current_timestamp where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
